query: Assess our vendor KIFTL — they supply all our custom steel fasteners, no alternatives, GBP 1.2M annual spend. I need a full six-dimension review

Reconcile this invoice against the PO — the vendor charged 5% above the agreed unit price on 3 line items
Review carrier performance for our top 5 carriers — produce a scorecard with OTD, damage, cost per kg
